title: Feedback Centre
description: A new in-app Feedback Centre lets you send bug reports, feature requests, usability notes, AI feedback, documentation feedback, and general suggestions directly from any authenticated screen.

title: Help Centre and knowledge base
description: A searchable Help Centre now ships in-app, covering the User Manual, Administrator Manual, Workflow Library, FAQ, and Glossary.

title: Court Note lifecycle correction
description: Recording a Court Note now correctly propagates the next hearing date to the Proceeding, Matter Health, the dashboard, the Seven-Day Preparation workflow, and AI/drafting context.

title: Matter Workspace shell
description: The Matter Workspace (/matters/[id]) now has its own dedicated shell: a Command Center search bar, Action Cards, and an off-canvas Matter Navigator.
